description: You are a new field technician setting up the farmOS Field Kit app and recording your first day of work. First, open the navigation menu, tap Login, and configure the server connection. Enter URL 'https://fieldops.stateu.edu', username 'tech_hansen', password 'Fld2025$afe'. Do NOT tap Log In. Return to the Tasks screen. Open the navigation menu again and disable Share My Location. Create an Input log titled 'Fall burndown Field 9 East' dated October 15, 2025 at 8:00 AM, marked Done. Notes: 'Pre-cover-crop burndown. Roundup PowerMAX 32 oz/ac plus AMS 8.5 lbs per 100 gal. Wind 6 mph SW, 58F. Buffer zones maintained.' Three quantities: value 32, measure volume, label 'Herbicide Rate oz per ac'; value 8.5, measure weight, label 'AMS Rate lbs per 100gal'; value 22, measure area, label 'Acres Treated'. Navigate to the MOVEMENT tab to verify the map loads, then return to GENERAL and save the log. Create an Observation log titled 'Post-application drift check' dated October 15, 2025 at 11:00 AM, marked NOT Done. Notes: 'Inspected downwind field boundary. No visible injury on crop residue. Wind shifted W 8 mph by 10:30. Recheck in 48 hours.' Two quantities: value 150, measure length, label 'Buffer Distance ft'; value 6, measure count, label 'Rows Inspected'. Save the log. Return to the Tasks list, open the 'Fall burndown Field 9 East' log, and append to its notes: ' Spray records filed with county ag office.'
